description: Resilience — gateway handles invalid/malformed tool calls gracefully. Expects 4xx (client error), never 500 (server crash).

tasks.name: Non-existent tool call
tasks.notes: Tool does not exist — gateway should return 4xx with error message, not crash.

tasks.name: Empty tool name
tasks.notes: Empty tool name — should be rejected with validation error.

tasks.name: Missing arguments field
tasks.notes: No arguments — gateway should handle missing optional field gracefully.

tasks.name: Oversized payload
tasks.notes: 10KB payload — gateway should either process or reject with 413, never crash.

tasks.name: Concurrent error requests
tasks.notes: 3 VUs × 15 iterations of bad requests — error handling must be consistent under load.
